policyname: Users can view files shared with them
Users can view own uploaded files
CEO and C_LEVEL can view all department files
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.uid = current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true)) AND (users.role = ANY (ARRAY['CEO'::text, 'C_LEVEL'::text])))))

policyname: Department heads can view their department files
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (departments d
     JOIN users u ON ((u.uid = current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true))))
  WHERE ((d.id = files_department_shares.department_id) AND (d.head_id = u.uid))))

policyname: Department members can view their department files
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users u
  WHERE ((u.uid = current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true)) AND (u.department = ( SELECT departments.name
           FROM departments
          WHERE (departments.id = files_department_shares.department_id))))))

policyname: Only CEO and C_LEVEL can delete department shares
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1

  WHERE ((users.uid = current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true)) AND (users.role = ANY (ARRAY['CEO'::text, 'C_LEVEL'::text])))))

policyname: Authenticated users can create any notification

qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (tasks t
     LEFT JOIN users u ON ((u.uid = current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true))))
  WHERE ((t.id = task_milestones.task_id) AND ((u.role = ANY (ARRAY['CEO'::text, 'C_LEVEL'::text, 'LEAD'::text])) OR (t.created_by = u.uid) OR (u.uid = ANY (t.assignee_ids))))))

policyname: Users can view milestones for accessible tasks
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (tasks t
     LEFT JOIN users u ON ((u.uid = current_setting('app.current_user_id'::text, true))))
  WHERE ((t.id = task_milestones.task_id) AND ((u.role = ANY (ARRAY['CEO'::text, 'C_LEVEL'::text, 'LEAD'::text])) OR (t.created_by = u.uid) OR (u.uid = ANY (t.assignee_ids)) OR (u.uid = ANY (t.viewer_ids))))))
